name: Articuno
description: A legendary bird Pokémon that is said to appear to doomed people who are lost in icy mountains.
lore: Articuno is one of the three Legendary birds of Kanto. Its feathers are said to sparkle like ice crystals in sunlight, and it can create blizzards by freezing moisture in the air.

name: Zapdos
description: A legendary bird Pokémon that is said to appear from clouds while dropping enormous lightning bolts.
lore: Zapdos is a legendary electric bird. It is said that when Zapdos rubs its electrified feathers together, it causes thunder and lightning.

name: Moltres
description: A legendary bird Pokémon. When Moltres flaps its flaming wings, they scatter a shower of flames, brightening and heating the air.
lore: Moltres is a legendary fire bird. Its body is constantly ablaze and its every wing flap can set the air on fire. It is said to appear in the spring and grant warmth to the world.

name: Mewtwo
description: A Pokémon that was created by genetic manipulation. However, even though the scientific power of humans made its body, they failed to endow Mewtwo with a compassionate heart.
lore: Created from Mew's DNA through years of horrific gene-splicing experiments, Mewtwo is considered the most powerful Pokémon ever discovered. It was engineered to be the ultimate battle Pokémon.

name: Mew
description: When viewed through a microscope, this Pokémon's short, fine, delicate hair can be seen. Mew is said to possess the genetic composition of all Pokémon.
lore: Mew is said to be the ancestor of all Pokémon. It contains the genetic code of every Pokémon species in its DNA, and can learn any move. It was thought to be extinct until recently.

name: Raikou
description: This Pokémon is said to have fallen with the lightning. It races across the land while its mane shimmers with electricity.
lore: One of the three Johto legendary beasts. Raikou embodies the speed of lightning and the rumble of thunder. It is said to have descended from lightning that struck a tower in Ecruteak City.

name: Entei
description: A Pokémon that races across the land. It is said that one is born whenever a new volcano appears.
lore: Entei embodies the passion of magma and is more powerful than a volcano's eruption. A legendary beast that roams freely across the lands, it is said that every time it roars, a volcano erupts somewhere in the world.

name: Suicune
description: This Pokémon races across the land. It is said to be the reincarnation of north winds.
lore: Suicune embodies the compassion of a pure spring of water. It can purify dirty water instantly and runs across the water with the north wind, seeking to purify all the filthy water in the world.

name: Lugia
description: It is said that a light flutter of its wings is powerful enough to blow apart regular houses.
lore: Lugia is the guardian of the seas and the master of the legendary birds. It is so powerful that even a light flap of its wings can cause a 40-day storm. It sleeps deep in the ocean to avoid harming others.

name: Ho-Oh
description: Its feathers glow in seven colors. It is said that anyone who witnesses its flight is promised eternal happiness.
lore: Ho-Oh is the guardian of the skies and is said to master the legendary beasts. It is believed to live at the foot of the rainbow. Those who see it are promised eternal happiness.

name: Celebi
description: This Pokémon came from the future by crossing over time. It is thought that so long as Celebi appears, a bright and shining future awaits.
lore: Celebi is a time-traveling Pokémon known as the Voice of the Forest. It wanders across time and appears only in peaceful times, leaving behind flourishing greenery wherever it visits.

name: Regirock
description: Regirock's body is composed entirely of rocks. Recently, a study made the startling discovery that the rocks were all found in different locations.
lore: Regirock is a Golem Pokémon entirely made of rock. When it is damaged in battle, it repairs itself by collecting new rocks. It was sealed away by ancient people for unknown reasons.

name: Regice
description: Regice's body was made during an ice age. The deep-frozen body can't be melted, even by fire. It controls cold air of minus 328 degrees F.
lore: Regice was formed during the ice age from glacial ice. Its body temperature is -328°F and it cannot be melted even by fire. It floats through the air while cloaked in freezing air.

name: Registeel
description: Registeel has a body that is harder than any kind of metal. Its body is apparently hollow. No one has any idea what this Pokémon eats.
lore: Registeel's body is made of a strange material that is harder than any metal, yet can be dented. It was tempered by pressure in the planet's mantle over tens of thousands of years.

name: Latias
description: Latias is highly sensitive to the emotions of people. She ruffles the feathers all over her body and cries loudly to alert her kind when she senses hostility.
lore: Latias can understand human speech and is highly empathic. She can refract light using her down to alter her appearance or make herself invisible. She is the feminine counterpart to Latios.

name: Latios
description: Latios has the ability to make others see an image of what it has seen or imagines in its head. It is intelligent and understands human speech.
lore: Latios can telepathically share visions it has seen and can fly faster than a jet plane. Highly protective of the Soul Dew, Latios only opens its heart to trainers with a compassionate spirit.

name: Kyogre
description: Kyogre is said to be the personification of the sea itself. Enthroned in the Seafloor Cavern, it will expand the seas.
lore: Kyogre is the ruler of the seas and is said to have expanded the oceans. It has clashed with Groudon since ancient times in an eternal battle of land versus sea. It can create massive rainstorms.

name: Groudon
description: Groudon is said to be the personification of the land itself. Legends tell of its many clashes against Kyogre, as each sought to expand its territory.
lore: Groudon represents the earth itself and can expand the land by evaporating water. It has warred with Kyogre in a battle over the ancient world. Its body is magma that can cause volcanic eruptions.

name: Rayquaza
description: Rayquaza is said to have lived for hundreds of millions of years. Legends remain of how it put to rest the clash between Kyogre and Groudon.
lore: Rayquaza has lived in the ozone layer for hundreds of millions of years, feeding on water and particles. It pacified the ancient battle between Kyogre and Groudon and can Mega Evolve without a Mega Stone.

name: Jirachi
description: A legend states that Jirachi will make true any wish that is written on notes attached to its head when it awakens.
lore: Jirachi sleeps for 1,000 years at a time, wrapped in a cocoon. During the 7 days it is awake, it can grant any wish. Even while sleeping, it fights using the three eyes on the tag on its head.

name: Deoxys
description: The DNA of a space virus underwent a sudden mutation upon exposure to a laser beam and resulted in Deoxys.
lore: Deoxys emerged from a virus that came from outer space and mutated upon exposure to a laser beam. The crystalline organ on its chest acts as its brain. It can exist in four different forms.

name: Zacian
description: Known as a legendary hero, this Pokémon absorbs metal particulates to transform into its Crowned Sword form.
lore: Zacian is said to be the hero who once saved Galar. In its Crowned Sword form, it wields a sacred sword that can cut through anything. Its elegant movements belie its immense power.

name: Zamazenta
description: In times past, it worked together with a king of the people to save the Galar region. It absorbs metal and can shift into its Crowned Shield form.
lore: Zamazenta is the legendary shield that protected Galar. In its Crowned Shield form, it can repel any attack. It fought alongside an ancient king to defeat the Darkest Day.

name: Eternatus
description: It was inside a meteorite that fell 20,000 years ago. There seems to be a connection between this Pokémon and the Dynamax phenomenon.
lore: Eternatus arrived on Earth 20,000 years ago inside a meteorite. It is the source of the Dynamax phenomenon and once caused the Darkest Day. It can absorb energy from the earth to power its attacks.

name: Regieleki
description: Its entire body is made of electrons. It is said to be the largest electric generator of all Pokémon.
lore: Regieleki's body is made entirely of electrons, making it the most powerful electric-type Pokémon. Its speed is unmatched. The rings on its body act as the seals that control its immense power.

name: Regidrago
description: It is said that Regidrago's body is composed of crystallized dragon energy. The dragon face on its head is formed from remnants of dragon Pokémon.
lore: Regidrago's body is crystallized dragon energy. Its dragon-head hands were made using the orbs of ancient dragons. Legends say that if its seal is broken, a terrifying dragon will roam the world.

name: Glastrier
description: Glastrier emits intense cold from its hooves. It's also a belligerent Pokémon—it will trample anything it dislikes with its frozen hooves.
lore: Glastrier emits powerful cold from its hooves. It is belligerent and will trample anything it dislikes. When it runs, its frozen hooves cause the ground around it to freeze solid.

name: Spectrier
description: It probes its surroundings with all its senses save one—it doesn't use its sense of sight. Spectrier's kicks are said to KO even the toughest of Pokémon.
lore: Spectrier senses its surroundings with all senses except sight. It absorbs the life force of sleeping Pokémon and dashes through the night, draining vitality as it goes.

name: Calyrex
description: Calyrex is a merciful Pokémon, capable of providing healing and blessings. It reigned over the Galar region in ancient times.
lore: Calyrex once ruled the entire Galar region and wielded the power to see all events of the past, present, and future. It lost its power long ago and seeks to regain its former glory.

name: Wo-Chien
description: Ancient texts have been found written in a language no one understands. These are said to be Wo-Chien's cursed tablet.
lore: Wo-Chien is one of the four Treasures of Ruin, born from the grudge of a subject who inscribed his resentment on wooden tablets. It drains the life force of plants to feed itself.

name: Chien-Pao
description: Old tales describe this Pokémon as the embodiment of a sword and the grudge of those slain by it.
lore: Chien-Pao is one of the four Treasures of Ruin, embodying a sacred sword stained with blood. It is the grudge of those slain by the blade, given form. Its icy fangs can pierce anything.

name: Ting-Lu
description: Ting-Lu's body is made from the combination of a cursed ritual vessel and the malice of countless people pondering disaster and calamity.
lore: Ting-Lu is one of the four Treasures of Ruin, formed from a cursed vessel and the fear of many people. It is said to cause earthquakes and floods wherever it wanders.

name: Chi-Yu
description: Chi-Yu's body is made from the combination of a cursed bead and the envy of people wishing to be beautiful.
lore: Chi-Yu is one of the four Treasures of Ruin, born from a jade bead containing the envy of people longing for beauty. Its burning eyes can melt anything it gazes upon.

name: Koraidon
description: Koraidon is a Pokémon that resembles an ancient creature, recorded in a book of old fairy tales as an ancestor of a Pokémon called Cyclizar.
lore: Koraidon is a Paradox Pokémon resembling an ancient dragon. It is the box legendary of Scarlet, representing the ancient past. Its powerful body uses a sun-like organ to draw on tremendous power.

name: Miraidon
description: Miraidon is described in a book about the future, with data suggesting it is a form that Cyclizar has taken.
lore: Miraidon is a Paradox Pokémon resembling a futuristic machine. It is the box legendary of Violet, representing the distant future. Its electromagnetic engine allows it to generate tremendous electric power.

name: Terapagos
description: This Pokémon was the origin of the Terastal phenomenon. It transforms energy into Tera crystals and uses them to maintain its Terastal Form.
lore: Terapagos is the origin of the Terastal phenomenon. When its energy is maximized, it transforms into its Stellar Form and creates a Tera Dome. It is the hidden legendary of Paldea.

name: Pecharunt
description: Pecharunt enslaved the four mighty Loyal Three using a morchi—a deadly mochi laced with toxic chains.
lore: Pecharunt enslaved the Loyal Three using mochi laced with deadly toxins. It is a tiny but dangerous Pokémon who controls others to do its bidding through chains of poison.
